content: TASK-048 checkpoint done under TASK-010: PNG export is now available as RenderResult.exportPng()/downloadPng(), custom-element controls include an Export PNG button, localhost playground and examples/demo.html include the same control, 2D exports convert the current SVG to PNG, and 3D exports capture the mounted WebGL canvas with preserveDrawingBuffer. Verification: npm run typecheck; npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts test/scene3d.test.ts; npm run build; git diff --check. Vite dev server restarted on http://127.0.0.1:4174/ (PID 90153). Browser plugin tab discovery failed in this session, so click-to-download was not exercised via browser automation. Next: continue TASK-010 by adding a browser download smoke test when possible, verifying the actual published CDN URL after release candidate, or resolving final spec wording/product decision for zone base view vs Add info overlay. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
